title: Lead Finance Secretary - Intermediate School
status: Full Time, 40 hours per weekMinimum Requirements:A minimum of an Associate's Degree or equivalent in accounting or business or two years related experience and/or training or equivalent combination of education and experience.Ability to use financial software, spreadsheets (e.g. Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets), and documents (e.g. Microsoft Excel, Google Docs).The salary for this position is assigned to Lane 8 of the SC Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkSC Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):Lead Finance Secretary, Intermediate & Middle School.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
